title: A Speech To Save Environment | Explanation in Hindi | Class 6
description:
Decades before climate anxiety became a global buzzword, young voices were already being taught to speak up for the planet — and "A Speech to Save Environment" from the Class 6 English syllabus captures exactly that urgent, uncomfortable truth that humans are destroying the very world that sustains them. What makes this piece remarkable is how it arms a student not just with vocabulary but with moral weight — the kind that makes a classroom speech feel like a courtroom argument. If you're preparing this chapter for your Class 6 exams and want every theme, device, and line explained clearly in Hindi, you're in exactly the right place.
